factor: Any cost result from this file
message: Always label as planning estimate only; require live quote before booking.

factor: Rate source older than 14 days for market benchmark
message: Rates may be stale; refresh benchmark or request quote.
Ask carrier/forwarder for THC, doc, delivery order, port storage and local fees.

factor: Free-time unknown or cargo likely to dwell
message: Flag demurrage/detention exposure and require last-free-day tracking.

factor: DG, reefer, tank, OOG, flat rack, open top cargo
message: Special cargo surcharge and carrier acceptance must be confirmed.

factor: User asks for exact final price
message: Do not provide exact quote from reference data; require live carrier/forwarder quote.
